title: ISP Pipeline Configuration
description: JSON DSL for describing an ISP processing pipeline with dynamic topology

pipeline_id.description: Unique identifier for this pipeline configuration

nodes.description: List of processing nodes in the pipeline

id.description: Unique node identifier within the pipeline

type.description: Node type, matching a registered ISP algorithm (e.g., RawReader, Demosaic, Denoise, ToneMapping)

params.description: Node-specific parameters. Keys match the registered parameter names for this node type.

edges.description: Connections between nodes forming the DAG
